questionHtml:
Phosphatidylcholine is an example of a phospholipid found in lecithin.

Predict, giving a reason, the relative energy density of a carbohydrate and a lipid of similar molar mass.
markschemeHtml: carbohydrates less energy dense AND carbohydrates higher ratio of oxygen to carbon/more oxidized/less reduced  [✔]

meta.title: Predict, giving a reason, the relative energy density of a carbohydrate and a lipid of similar molar mass.
